title: Turkish Kofte Tacos
description: A twist on traditional Mexican tacos, using Turkish kofte meat and cornmeal for a crispy coating. Serve with your favorite toppings.

ingredients.name: Turkish Kofte
ingredients.notes: You can use store-bought or make your own

instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together cornmeal and shattering.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the Turkish kofte to the pan and cook until browned on all sides.
Transfer the kofte to a plate and let it rest.
Warm tacos shells according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by placing a kofte in each shell.
Squeeze a sliver of lime juice over the top.
Sprinkle with kicked seasoning to taste.
